categories.name: A MAN, A PLAN, A CANAL... ERIE!

questions.clue: This New York governor was the man & "DeWitt" behind the Erie Canal
The plan:To build a canal connecting Lake Erie with the upper part of this New York river
Part of the plan:To put the canal's western end at this city on Lake Erie
Another part of the plan:83 of these, to move boats up & down the canal's natural elevations
More of the plan:Hire Canvass White, who invented a type of this that hardened into a concrete-like stuff underwater
